meta-description: Learn about employer or union retiree plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Employer or union retiree plans
excerpt: Plans that provide health and/or drug coverage to former employees or members, and, in some cases, their families. These plans are offered to people through their (or a spouse's) former employer or employee organization. Many of these plans aren't legally required to meet many of the provisions of the Affordable Care Act, including providing coverage for children up to age 26.
